faqs.question: What types of ants are common in North Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: North Merrick properties typically deal with carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method for your situation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for North Merrick residents in most cases. Our team understands that ant infestations can escalate quickly, especially during peak season, so we prioritize rapid response times to prevent colonies from spreading throughout your home.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our ant control service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of ant species and entry points, targeted interior and exterior treatment, nest elimination, and preventative barrier application. The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and treatment complexity. We provide detailed quotes after our initial assessment.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets in North Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any brief precautions needed during treatment and work with your schedule to minimize disruption to your household routine.
